title: FabricatedISectionProfile
description: FabricatedISectionProfile: I-shaped profile with parallel flanges that allows for different thicknesses of the web, top flange and bottom flange as well as different top and bottom flange widths.

Height.description: Full depth between the extreme fibres of the flanges. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

TopFlangeWidth.description: Full width of the top flange. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

BotFlangeWidth.description: Full width of the bottom flange. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

WebThickness.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

TopFlangeThickness.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

BotFlangeThickness.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

WeldSize.description: Fillet weld size between web and flanges. Measured as the distance between intersection of web and flange perpendicular to the edge of the weld. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Edges.description: Edge curves that matches the dimensions in the global XY-plane.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
